items.text: I have never come across someone like her... admired her courage, bravery and kindness.
items.context: Ernst Vogt, Noor's primary Gestapo interrogator, testified after the war to Jean Overton Fuller about his respect for her character despite being her captor
items.publicReaction: Widely cited in historical sources as remarkable testimony from her interrogator about her exceptional character and strength of spirit
items.source: Jean Overton Fuller, Madeleine (1952); referenced in Al Jazeera and multiple historical sources

items.text: Assistant Section Officer Inayat-Khan displayed the most conspicuous courage, both moral and physical over a period of more than 12 months.
items.context: Official George Cross citation recognizing her posthumous award, the highest civilian decoration for gallantry in the United Kingdom
items.publicReaction: Publicly celebrated as official recognition of her heroism and exceptional character
items.source: London Gazette, April 5, 1949; cited in Victoria Cross Canada and multiple official sources

items.text: However, she refused to abandon what had become the principal and most dangerous post in France, even though she had been given the opportunity to return to England.
items.context: Statement in her George Cross citation describing her decision to remain as the sole radio operator in occupied France despite mortal danger
items.publicReaction: Widely celebrated and cited in historical accounts as exemplary of her commitment to her mission
items.source: London Gazette; Victoria Cross Canada official citation

items.text: She encoded twice as many messages as he asked for and made no mistakes at all.
items.context: Leo Marks, the SOE codemaster, documented her exceptional performance during her final coding examination before deployment, setting impossible tests she exceeded
items.publicReaction: Documented in historical sources as evidence of her exceptional technical skill despite being underestimated by her training officers
items.source: Multiple biographical sources; referenced in SWWEC article on SOE agents
